entry.title: Assign manual batch/serial numbers for when the batch/serial automation setting is activated in CCO
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I hope this message finds you well.

I want to know if there is any possibility of assigning a manual batch/serial number for a sales item through a plugin when the automatic batch/serial number assign setting is activated in SAP Customer Checkout?

We have built a single screen for updating the batch/serial, quantity and price. Currently, our plugin is assigned custom batch/serial, quantity and price for a sales item. It's updated correctly in the customer checkout receipt but it's not updated in the SAP B1 after the payment. (without the automatic batch/serial number assign setting activated it works fine and updates the SAP B1 as well)

Thank You.!

Best Regards,

Ashen.

entry.title: Re: Customer master partner function field RF02D-KTONR Partner function number change
entry.content:
Hi,

If I have not misunderstood the problem, I recommend you to review USEREXIT_SAVE_DOCUMENT_PREPARE  by searching the google.

entry.title: Re: Can I add a column to the MAT0M search help?
entry.content:
Hello @luis_rod 

Yes, you can do that. You need to add LVORM to the MAT0M parameters:

However bear in mind that it is a change to SAP standard. Unlikely as it might seem, SAP might update the MAT0M search help and overwrite your modifications - see the answer from @tmt-cpro 

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: smarttable barcode
entry.content:
Hi

You can put your code inside onAfterRendering method of your view controller. This will ensure that your code is executed after rendering of view is finished.

Thanks

Sajid Khan

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Code Jam Error on Part 8
entry.content: I am checking with development. We got this issue several months ago and it had something to do with subscriptions and nothing about the specific destination. I will update when I know more.

entry.title: Re: How can I save Requirement in Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hi, there is a dedicated channel to send requirements which can be voted by other customers.

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/3501

entry.title: Re: How can I save Requirement in Cloud ALM
entry.content: Hi, there is a dedicated channel to send requirements which can be voted by other customers.

entry.title: Struggling with Filters on Select - Fiori App
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I hope this message finds you well.

I am currently working on a project that involves two dropdown menus. The first dropdown, Box 1, displays a list of manufacturers, such as A and B. The second dropdown, Box 2, presents the corresponding models for each manufacturer, for instance, A1, A2, A3 for manufacturer A, and B1, B2, B3 for manufacturer B.

Upon initial load, Box 1 defaults to manufacturer A, and Box 2 contains all models (A1, A2, A3, B1, B2, B3), with A1 being the pre-selected model.

My objective is to dynamically filter the options in Box 2 based on the selection made in Box 1. I attempted to implement this functionality using the following code snippet, but it was unsuccessful:

Nevertheless, I managed to achieve the desired outcome by hardcoding the filter value as shown below:

items = {
path: '/SprayModelSet',
filters: [{ path: 'SprayMachineMake', operator: 'EQ', value1: 'A' }],
sorter: { path: 'SprayMachineModel' }
};

This code effectively narrows down the options in Box 2 to A1, A2, A3, with A1 as the default selection, while excluding the B series models.

However, I am encountering difficulties in making the filter dynamic, such that the selected value from Box 1 is passed as a filter to Box 2.

Could you please provide guidance on how to achieve this dynamic filtering?

Thank you for your assistance.

Warm regards,

Pablo Ghosh Roy

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation Pre-built content for Finance Use cases
entry.content:
The definition of pre-built content, how it helps your business to jump-start your automation development and how to discover them is explained in the blog, ‘Accelerate Business Process Development with SAP Build Process Automation Pre-Built Content’

This blog covers the pre-built content for finance use cases specifically.

Financial operations refer to the management of finances and resources within a company. These operations include, accounting, budgeting, cash management, financial forecasting etc. They are the backbone of any organization and require strong and robust solutions to accomplish them.

SAP S/4HANA Finance is SAP’s flagship financial solution. There are many competitive and core features of S/4HANA Finance that helps you solve your Finance and Accounting requirements.

Though SAP S/4HANA Finance solution offers various solutions for widely used finance operations across the industries, there are some features that must be extended with BTP with side-by-side extension approach in order to solve customer requirements.

Side-by-side extensions mean extension and integration with custom or standard business applications of the SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP). This is either via stable APIs or through business events from an SAP product, for example, SAP S/4HANA.

SAP Build Process Automation is used along with the SAP S/4HANA Finance application as a side-by-side extension, to solve complex business use cases that are not planned in the near future as a feature in SAP S/4HANA Finance module. These are identified and validated as a white space in the SAP S/4HANA finance product. Examples of the processes include, Mass processing of Accruals, Creation of Supplier Invoice by Reference Invoice, External Approval while posting Journal Entry etc.

Currently there are 100+ finance use cases for which pre-built content exists in SAP Business Accelerator Hub

These are the widely used use cases in finance industry across various organizations and sectors.

They can be used with no or very minimal changes which makes it as industry best practice.

In order to discover the finance use cases, follow the steps mentioned in the blog ‘Accelerate Business Process Development with SAP Build Process Automation Pre-Built Content’

Or you can simply use the below link to see them in SAP Business Accelerator Hub.

https://api.sap.com/build?$filter=(LinesOfBusiness:%5B%22Finance%22%5D,ProjectTypeHierarchy:%5B%22Process%3ETask%20Automation%22,%22Process%3EBusiness%20Process%22,%22Process%3ELive%20Process%22%5D)

Explaining some of the SAP S/4HANA Finance Use-cases:

 

1: Journal Entry Posting Approval

A journal entry records financial transactions that a business engages in throughout the accounting period. These entries serve as the initial step to create ledgers and trial balances. Eventually, they are used to compile a full set of financial statements for the company.

This pre-built content covers the capability to validate the journal entry details and based on the document checks, it is posted to SAP S/4HANA on-premise system.

SOLUTION ARCHITECTURE:

This template automates the posting of journal entries to general ledger accounts like making adjustment entries during period end closing or recording business transactions that do not have a source of document etc. It has the below features:

  • StartUI for data input used for entering the journal entry details with create or upload options
  • TaskUI approval form for the journal entry approval.
  • Approval process for approval of journal entry data by determined approver(s) that need to be posted to SAP S/4HANA.
  • Automations for document check & document post.
  • Decisions to determine approvers to approve the journal entries.

You can add the pre-built content into your tenant and explore more details via the below link.

Link to the template in Business Accelerator Hub

YouTube video for Journal Entry Posting Approval Process

 

2: Mass Fixed Asset Acquisition

Business organizations need to acquire long-term assets for their business, which is known as Fixed Asset acquisition. Examples include purchasing machinery, furniture, land and buildings, software, vehicles, or other tangible investments that will be used for a period of more than one year. The fixed asset acquisition process involves researching and evaluating potential purchases to ensure they are necessary and appropriate for the business, negotiating terms, obtaining approvals, managing the payment and delivery processes, and recording details in the books of accounts.

This pre-built content enables business experts to accelerate the mass asset acquisition posting process.

SOLUTION ARCHITECTURE:

This template facilitates the creation of Mass Fixed Asset Acquisition and has the following features:

  • Start UI screen, to collect the initial selection criteria (Download/Upload) so that required fixed asset acquisition data can be read from SAP S/4HANA Cloud system.
  • Once the data is read, it is stored in an excel sheet in a specified folder as provided by the requestor of the process.
  • The data can be reviewed/enhanced by the user and upload it again in the Start UI so that approval workflow gets triggered.
  • Once the approval is provided by the decision determined approver, the new data gets posted into SAP S/4HANA Cloud system.

You can add the pre-built content into your tenant and explore more details via the below link.

Link to the template in Business Accelerator Hub

 

3: Mass Creation of Bank Master

Bank master data includes essential details about banks that your company interacts with, such as their addresses, control data, and unique identifiers. This data is maintained once and reused across transactions without frequent changes.

Bank master creation in SAP refers to the process of setting up and maintaining information related to banks within the SAP system.

This pre-built content enables businesses to create bank master in an automated way after approval is provided by a designated approver.

SOLUTION ARCHITECTURE:

This template facilitates read and create of the bank master in SAP S/4HANA cloud system and has the following features:

  • Check the email with attachment of excel file and save it in a specified folder.
  • Read the excel file and check the existing bank master data in SAP S/4HANA cloud system.
  • If data already exists in the SAP S/4HANA cloud system, then details are copied from the system and sent to the requester to review. If details are not existing in the system, an approval flow is triggered so that approver reviews bank master and take a decision on approval.
  • Once approval is done, data is added into SAP S/4HANA Cloud system.

You can add the pre-built content into your tenant and explore more details via the below link.

Link to the template in Business Accelerator Hub

 

4: Manage Invoices without Purchase Order

Businesses use non-PO invoice that doesn’t have any associated Purchase Orders (PO), which are usually the result of spending outside of the usual procurement process.

A non-PO invoice, as opposed to a PO-based invoice, hasn’t been pre-approved and, therefore, needs to go through the invoice approval process within the purchasing department.

This pre-built content enables SAP ERP customers to automate the creation and update of non- PO Vendor Invoice in a transparent approach and provide flexibility to meet business requirements. It includes processes, decisions, automation, and visibility scenario artefacts.

SOLUTION ARCHITECTURE:

This template contains API trigger that triggers the process with required invoice details that is submitted from SAP UI5 application form. The template has the following features:

  • The SAP UI5 screen has invoice details of header and item level, attachments and comments, which can be used to fill details of the invoice and trigger the process.
  • Invoice data can be validated with decisions that provide easy & flexible use of business validation.
  • Approver(s) & watcher(s) are notified via email about the request.
  • This template also uses a decision to group invoice item details for delegation of approval request to the responsible approvers.

You can add the pre-built content into your tenant and explore more details via the below link.

Link to the template in Business Accelerator Hub

Other interesting use cases that you may want to explore in SAP Business Accelerator Hub with respect to Finance LOB are:

1: Central Finance Mappings (CFIN Mapping)

SAP Central Finance is used as a single repository of financial accounting. It replicates the master data from different source systems into SAP Central Finance running on SAP S/4HANA RISE (private cloud).

This template automates the process of mapping, replication and is also capable of resolving issues that may occur or provide insight into the issue which would assist an analyst in resolving it.

This pre-built content is maintained by Central Finance team.

2: Safe Deactivation Procedure for Central Finance Replication

Central Finance uses SAP Landscape Transformation Replication Server (SLT) to transfer data between Source System(s) and the Central Finance system. In a standard replication, users simply deactivate and reactivate replication. However, Central Finance recommends a multi-step procedure for safe deactivation and reactivation.

This template helps in identifying and performing safe deactivation and reactivation of central and non-central finance replication. Creation of log for the execution and facilitates to send email to designated recipients.

This pre-built content is maintained by Central Finance team.

3: Creation of Supplier Invoice by Reference Invoice

Businesses need to create supplier invoices with reference to preceding documents, such as purchase orders, goods and services receipts, inbound deliveries, or purchasing contracts.

This pre-built content streamlines and automates the process of supplier invoice creation with variable amount by monthly / weekly reference invoice within the SAP S/4HANA public cloud system.

entry.title: Re: Realtime (delta) Data Replication from SAP Analytics Cloud to BW/4 HANA
entry.content:
Thank your for the posting here!

One general question to the author and also to the current colleagues who are using already this scenario:

Can you give some advice about the sizing topic? 

Is it really possible and feasible to calculate the IO Volume before sizing the server hardware for the DP Agent? I mean we are struggling a little bit to foresee, which Sizing in terms of RAM and CPU cores is really needed for our scenario.

What we do is to transfer like 100 mio records from a SAC tenant into our BW4 Hana 2021 SPS4 backend which runs on prem.

 

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Can we change material availability date in Sales ord...
entry.content:
Hi 'SAP learner',

When we talk about Material Availability Date (MBDAT), we talk also about scheduling. Once you entered a requested delivery date for the schedule line, the scheduling calculated multiple dates, also the MBDAT.

From what I understand, you have stock physical available in the warehouse and you would like to get it confirmed today. My first question would be: Do you use ATP to get reliable confirmations? If the answer is yes, that it can indeed be that although you have stock physical available, you do not get a confirmation for today (MBDAT =  today). Reason is simply, that you have promised the material already for a concurrent demand. ATP helps you to prevent over confirmation situations.

To see what you have really available, please use the app Monitor Product Availability (co09).

Can you please spend some words on how the situation is in your system, to be more precise, how it is with the material? Do you use ATP?

Regards,
Andreas

entry.title: Re: Proration of flat rate
entry.content:
Hello @katrin_frenzel ,

I'm not sure what wrong I have done. 

My schema setup:

 

My operand setup (factor is maintained as 1 from 03/16/2024): 

 

Operand access control (All operand values selected):

 

Bill period (03/07 to 04/05) : Charge not appearing at all (wrong - it should have been prorated from 03/16 to 04/05)

 

Bill period (04/06 to 04/05) : Charge is appearing for the full period (correct)

 

Price key setup:

 

I'm not able to understand where I'm going wrong

entry.title: Issues faced in the Building Side-by-Side Extensions on SAP BTP
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have implemented the Side by Side Extension on SAP BTP using CAP (https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/build-side-by-side-extensions-on-sap-btp) and I am currently facing 3 issues as follows:
1. When I run my Risk Management App locally, I get the below error:

I would like to know which Auth aspect would I need to check to resolve this. This was working fine before but have started to face this after I made the changes to deploy the app in Cloud Foundry.

 

2. I have deployed the app in Cloud Foundry, but get the below message when I run the app in CF:

 

Logs:
{"written_at":"2024-04-25T06:25:42.949Z","written_ts":1714026342949000000,"csn_component":"-","correlation_id":"e068b7c6-eae8-497b-5b67-fd6a35c4e48f","type":"log","logger":"nodejs-logger","layer":"/Handler","level":"error","container_id":"10.32.3.5","component_type":"application","component_id":"5e07e58f-51c7-4412-b094-f1c3faadf443","component_name":"risk-management","component_instance":-1,"source_instance":-1,"organization_id":"5345543f-4ece-41a5-8d90-102a920f6be9","organization_name":"cbca00ddtrial","space_id":"ab716db3-0b31-4224-85eb-ea9432035ed3","space_name":"dev","request_id":"e068b7c6-eae8-497b-5b67-fd6a35c4e48f","msg":"GET request to launchpad.htm/launchpad.html completed with status 404 ENOENT: no such file or directory, stat '/home/vcap/app/launchpad.html'"}

3. While running the CI/CD pipeline, the Release stage faced the below error:

[2024-04-25T05:17:30.379Z] ***
[2024-04-25T05:17:30.379Z] hudson.AbortException: [cloudFoundryDeploy] Step execution failed (category: undefined). Error: running command 'cf' failed: cmd.Run() failed: exit status 1
[2024-04-25T05:17:30.379Z] ***

My project is in the below links:
https://github.com/ElAfc/RiskManagement.git

 

Happy to share any other info that is needed.

Any help on this would be appreciated.

entry.title: Re: 如何使用钻取
entry.content: 好的，谢谢

entry.title: Re: Doubt - SAP IBP Cost Roll Up calculation
entry.content: So, If I have my waarehouse which receipts the material from 3 different the vendors (this is the initial node of the supply chain). They supply the same material: Vendor1 LT=0, Vendor2 LT=5 and Vendor3 LT=1. It will start making the NAGCSTTRANSPORTUNITCOST calculation at period +1 (for example, current week is 15, so it will give me the first value at week 16 taking into account only vendor3).

entry.title: Re: Advanced Shipping and Receiving Simplifying the Connectivity
entry.content:
Hi Arjun,
Thanks for sharing your insights.
As an addition please note following.
SAP delivers BC sets for ASR with corresponding document types and relevant profiles:

/SCWM/DLV_INBOUND_FO

/SCWM/DLV_OUTBOUND_FO

If you use these you can reuse standard profiles or copy from these.

I would love to be part of the digital skills initiative.

Please consider my application for free SAP certification. Thank You!

Thanks

entry.title: Re: ABAP2XLSX problem downloading file
entry.content:
You should file a bugreport on Github:

  • explain that you're manually backporting to an unsupported system (I might remember about this tomorrow but not sure about next week... and other devs might not be aware of this thread)
  • attach the source code
  • attach the generated XLSX

One of the devs might then generate a similar output on a supported system and then compare the results; be aware that the issue might not be solvable at all, if it comes down to the system being too old.

Oh... and please format the code with the "source code" tag 😄

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Work Zone - Transport Route
entry.content:
@Shashanka Thanks for this helpful blog. Can you provide details on how to actually transport the Workzone site? There is no option of adding the Workzone site to a CTMS Queue or "promote" option available as in the case of SBPA.
Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Proration of flat rate
entry.content:
Hello @katrin_frenzel ,

I'm not sure what wrong I have done. 

My schema setup:

 

 

My operand setup (factor is maintained as 1 from 03/16/2024): 

 

 

Operand access control (All operand values selected):

 

 

Bill period (03/07 to 04/05) : Charge not appearing at all (wrong - it should have been prorated from 03/16 to 04/05)

 

 

Bill period (04/06 to 04/05) : Charge is appearing for the full period (correct)

 

 

Price key setup:

 

 

I'm not able to understand where I'm going wrong

entry.title: Re: Proration of flat rate
entry.content: You need to maintain also the time slice with factor 0.

entry.title: Re: Proration of flat rate
entry.content: The variant will be only executed when values are available for complete billing period.

entry.title: Re: Abap2xlsx: print internal table without header
entry.content: No need to clobber BIND_TABLE, see the discussion on this old PR: https://github.com/abap2xlsx/abap2xlsx/pull/1010

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite - IDOC to flat file conversion
entry.content: Thanks Azmath , we are trying to explore any standard solution rather than customized groovy scripts

entry.title: Re: Boost Your Career: Get Certified as CAP Backend Developer

most of the links in this one seems to be broken.

Can it be updated please?

 

Regards,

Saritha

entry.title: Re: Custom data as table, CDS, Domain, Business object and all that jazz...
entry.content:
Hello @mlauber,

Thank you for the blog, it's very interesting, I learned some new things. I have a few questions though:

 

A while ago we created a custom business object using the app on our S/4HANA public cloud custo tenant. We ran into two issues there:

  1. The BO/CDS/... created by the app were not available on our development tenant and could not be used during developer extensibility projects. In the section "Case 4: Combining data for reports" point 3 "Use on-stack development to create your own custom CDS views" you are saying that developer extensibility can make use of objects created by key user extensibility apps (specifically referring to case 1 and 2). Does this mean that in general objects generated by key user extensibility are accessible in the dev tenant? If that is the case, would that mean that objects created using the app "Custom Business Objects" are not available in the developer tenant and can't be used during developer extensibility (or did we do something wrong :D)?
  2. The BO we created using the app "Custom Business Objects" could only have a two leveled hierarchy, meaning a parent and a child. We couldn't add a child to the child (or another child to the parent), is this something that is now possible? If not, will this be possible in the future?

 

Thanks & Regards,

entry.title: Re: No material number passed on Rebate settlement
entry.content: May I know what is the OSS note about.

entry.title: How to transport Build Workzone Site to another subaccount via CTMS?
entry.content:
Hi All,

I want to transport SAP Build Workzone Site to my QA and Prod subaccount via CTMS. For example, in SAP Build Process Automation project, there is a button "Promote" available, which automatically adds the transport to the CTMS Queue/ transport nodes.
However, for Build Workzone there is no button/option available to directly transport/ promote the content to CTMS queue for import.

I could only find this blog for setting up the CTMS for Workzone site but it doesn't cover all the steps required for transporting the site.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/sap-build-work-zone-transport-route/ba-p/13606766#:~:text=Step%201%3A%20Create%20the%20directories,Build%20Work%20Zone%20standard%20Edition.&text=Step%204%3A%20Repeat%20step%202,SAP%20Cloud%20Transport%20Management%20Service

I provided the required Header and Query parameters. Following is the URL i am using.

entry.title: I am using exit_saplkedrcopa_001 for enhancement to populate characteristics values in KEDR.
entry.content: When creating Sales order VA01 characteristics values is populating well but after saving the sales order they are empty or getting cleared....but in VA02 it's working fine after saving the same sales order it is populating and doesn't get clear...what can be the issue?

entry.title: Re: Proration of flat rate
entry.content:
Hello @katrin_frenzel 

I have added the 0 factor value from 03/01 top 03/15 where the bill period start date is 03/07.

This is working now. Thanks a lot for your help. 

Marking your solution as working. 😃

entry.title: Re: Need Help to extract value from message with groovy s...
entry.content: Thank you Burak,

entry.title: Re: Limiting 1 Completion per Item per Calendar Year
entry.content: Thank you @Marie_McGuire. Appreciate your confirmation. I will leave this thread open for now, in case others in the community have more thoughts and suggestions.

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 4 - Mobile device capabilities
entry.content:
Hello, 

tips for find the solution : 
>> The GET_COLLECTION wait an array, analyse the json result, and you can see you have not an array. So to resolve this problem, you need to address the correct path in the response to get an array directly.  😉

entry.title: Re: SAP SuccessFactors Incentive Management - Guide to XDL APIs
entry.content:
Hi  yogananda nice blog, thank you for taking the time to showcase this functionality of XDL. I have tried this API and some URIS return not authenticated, while other work. I'm using a Service Account in the Administrator group, do you know why this could happen? I have checked and the bearer token i'm sending is correct in both cases. 

Thank you,

Jesús Vallejo

entry.title: Re: Connect to ABAP environment using RFC
entry.content:
Hi Gustaf,

yes, you need to install ADT locally as explained in the getting started guide: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/6aa39f1ac05441e5a23f484f31e477e7/e3527dfa1c5a41f69d4e63691f174f0a.html

Best regards
Kai

entry.title: Checking HANA Cloud Vector Engine performances
entry.content:
I am composing this blog to check the performance of HANA Vector Store, with particular emphasis on the following aspects:

  • The quantum of memory utilized to store embeddings as well as to conduct a search.
  • The duration required to perform a search.

Summary

Here are the summary of environment, data and measured memory and time. Search time will be shorten when vector indexing is implemented.

  • SAP HANA Cloud: 
    • Memory: 60 GB
    • CPU: 4 vCPUs
    • Version: 4.00.000.00.1710841718 (fa/CE2024.2)
  • Data: 1024 dimension * 300,000 records
  • Memory Usage of table: 13GB
  • Search
    • Memory Usage: 8.1MB(Consumed memory was smaller than calculated based on help doc.)
    • Time:  97ms

Environment

Python on Google Colaboratory

As of 2024/4, python version is 3.10.12 on Google Colaboratory.

PackageVersion
hana_ml2.20.24031902

Jupyter Implementation to store embeddings

1. pip install

First of all, install hana_ml using pip.

 

!pip install hana_ml

 

2. import packages

Next, import required packages.  

 

from hana_ml import ConnectionContext
from hana_ml.dataframe import create_dataframe_from_pandas
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

 

3. Check SAP HANA Cloud Connection

Now check if SAP HANA Cloud is available.

 

cc= ConnectionContext(
    address='<* * *>',
    port='443',  # 443 is usual
    user='<* * *>',
    password='<* * *>',
    encrypt=True
    )
print(cc.hana_version())
print(cc.get_current_schema())

 

 You can see HANA Cloud version and your current schema name. 

4.00.000.00.1710841718 (fa/CE2024.2)
<Your schema name> 

 Just define table name, dimension and row as constants. 

 

TAB = 'VECTOR_TEST'  
DIMENSION = 1_024
ROW = 300_000

 

 4. Create random embeddings

Create random embeddings using numpy and pandas.  It takes about 5 minutes.

 

df = pd.DataFrame({'ID': np.arange(ROW)})
df['VECTOR_STR'] = df.apply(lambda row: str(np.random.random(DIMENSION).astype('float32').tolist()), axis=1)
df['VECTOR'] = np.nan

 

Here are the dataframe info.

<class 'pandas.core.frame.DataFrame'> 
RangeIndex: 300000 entries, 
0 to 299999 Data columns (total 3 columns):
 # Column Non-Null Count Dtype 
--- ------ -------------- -----
 0 ID 300000 non-null int64
 1 VECTOR_STR 300000 non-null object
 2 VECTOR 0 non-null float64
 dtypes: float64(1), int64(1), object(1)
 memory usage: 6.9+ MB

5. Define table and upload data

Proceed to define a table and upload a dataframe into this newly defined table. Ordinarily, I would use the "create_table" function, however, as of April 2024, the data type REAL_VECTOR is unavailable.  It takes about an hour.

 

def create_table(cc, sql, df):
    if cc.has_table(TAB):
        cc.drop_table(TAB)
    cc.execute_sql(sql)
    dfh = create_dataframe_from_pandas(
            connection_context=cc,
            pandas_df=df,
            table_name=TAB,
            append=True
         )
    cc.execute_sql(f'''UPDATE {TAB} SET VECTOR = TO_REAL_VECTOR(VECTOR_STR);''')
    print(dfh.get_table_structure())
    display(dfh.head(3).collect())
    return dfh

#sql = f'''CREATE LOCAL TEMPORARY COLUMN TABLE {TAB}(
sql = f'''CREATE TABLE {TAB}(
           ID INT,
           VECTOR_STR NCLOB,
           VECTOR REAL_VECTOR(1024));'''  # create_table hana_ml 2.20.24031902 doesn't deal with REAL_VECTOR
dfh = create_table(cc, sql, df)

 

 6. Similarity Search

Create vector search function and test the search function. You can use L2DISTANCE  as well.  It takes 857 ms, which includes network time between google colab and HANA. Later I search again from HANA SQL Console with printed SQL.

 

def run_vector_search(k=10):
    query_vector = str(np.random.random(DIMENSION).astype('float32').tolist())
    sql = f'''SELECT TOP {k} "ID",
        "COSINE_SIMILARITY"("VECTOR", TO_REAL_VECTOR('{query_vector}')) as "COSINE_SIMILARITY"
        FROM "{TAB}"
        ORDER BY "COSINE_SIMILARITY"("VECTOR", TO_REAL_VECTOR('{query_vector}')) DESC'''
    hdf = cc.sql(sql)
    print(sql)
    df_context = hdf.head(k).collect()
    return df_context

df_context = run_vector_search()
print(df_context)

 

Here are the result of the search.

ID COSINE_SIMILARITY
0 157139 0.780948
1 227217 0.776527
2 231114 0.776151
3 87678 0.774138
4 116329 0.774049
5 38166 0.773831
6 220076 0.773783
7 253965 0.773703
8 134814 0.773081
9 256103 0.772673

7. Close HANA connection

Close HANA connection and the local temporary table is dropped automatically.

 

cc.close()

 

Performances

Memory usage of the table

Memory usage and time when searching

From SQL console, I executed the query printed on jupyter step 6.  Consumed memory was smaller than calculated based on help doc.

Client elapsed time:    97.00 ms
Statement prepare time: 0.9140 ms elapsed time, 0.2370 ms CPU time
Statement execute time: 91.57 ms elapsed time, 297.9 ms CPU time
Peak memory consumed:   8.131 MB

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 4 - Mobile device capabilities
entry.content:
@Jonathan_Fr thanks.

@YogSSohanee If the API does not return a list, SAP Build Apps does not automatically know which list inside the response is the one you want so you have to tell it, in the response key path field (just a JavaScript notation from the root of the response).

entry.title: Issue block stock to vendor
entry.content:
Dear team,

Im looking for end to end solution for issue of material to vendor from block stock with reffer to batch wise. The same material will be received with new batch from vendor.

Kindly look into this and give an appropriate solution

entry.title: Re: Group Reporting Rule Based COI - TP calculation
entry.content:
Hi,

In the delivered rules, the trigger data for rules 040 and 041 is the same. So if the rule 040 posts an elimination, it is likely that what is missing for the rule 041 is the percentage. 

The rule 041 reads the percentage on group level (group shares), this means on posting level 30 (with the delivered document types 38 and 39). If you have reported the ownership share % on posting level 00 or 10, you must calculate the group shares by running the task "Calculate Group Shares %" in the consolidation monitor. Then the groups share % is posted on the statistical FS item and can be read by the rule 041.

See also: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/90c07e91c7a64f328be3fd6b48955b13/9453a9b45c1a41f08f16924f20e6806c.html?locale=en-US and https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/90c07e91c7a64f328be3fd6b48955b13/79940df720e24c29b1569dda5d741bc7.html?locale=en-US 

Hope this helps!

entry.title: Authentication is failed from time to time while submitting eDocuments to ITA
entry.content:
How does authentication work for the ITA while submitting eDocuments for Allocation Number?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Authentication is failed from time to time while subm...
entry.content:
Israel forces authentication before starting to work with the ITA systems. ITA refreshes the authentication periodically.

SAP solution supports this process by using the API published by ITA. End user will see web page where they can enter the credentials. DRC catches the response by ITA and stores it and used later on to interact with ITA systems.

End users should initiate the authentication (at first and periodically)

  1. Call the Transaction EDOC_COCKPIT
  2. Select line with the status Authorization Failed
  3. In the Menu choose More -> Redirect
  4. Fill your ID and ITA Fix code in the ITA pop-up window
  5. You will see status redirect for authorization
  6. Click on Get Service Status
  7. Then, select other lines with status Authorization Failed and More -> Retry

So, to conclude, the Authentication Failure is common since the ITA refreshes all the tokens periodically. You just have to Redirect and then Retry for the Authentication Failed Invoices.

entry.title: Re: Connecting SAP CAP with SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hello @TuncayKaraca & @carolinalechner ,

Thank you very much for your feedback. I truly appreciate your responses. After thoroughly reviewing the links you provided. Thanks to you I have come to the realization that unfortunately, it is not possible to connect an individual CAP application to CALM. As a result, we have decided to instead link Cloud Foundry with the CALM Health Monitor.

Allow me to briefly outline the progress of my work so far:

  • I have inserted the destination.
  • Created a service key in the CALM subaccount.
  • Set up the Alert Notification Service in the CF subaccount.
  • Added the Cloud Foundry subaccount to the scope selection.
  • Activated monitoring.

Essentially, I have followed all the instructions provided here: https://support.sap.com/en/alm/sap-cloud-alm/operations/expert-portal/health-monitoring/health-monitoring-setup-configuration/health-monitoring-for-sap-btp-cf.html?anchorId=section_322971014_co  . According to my understanding, data should now be available. However, I have not yet received any data in the CALM Health Monitor.

Do you perhaps have any tips for me, or are you aware of any tutorials that could assist me further?

Once again, thank you very much for your help.

 

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Use case of Custom Authorization objects for Purchase Order T-codes ME21N, ME22N and ME23N
entry.content: Thanks for the Article

entry.title: Re: Post payload to CPI iFlow from UI5 - Internal Server...
entry.content:
Cpi destination and UI5 app are in different subaccountsCpi destination and UI5 app are in different subaccounts ->

I would guess this is the reason for the issue. The app can only work with destinations in the same subaccount. If you check the logs of the app in BTP cockpit after the failed call, my assumption would be that you find a message where it tells that it could not find a destination with the name cpi.

entry.title: Re: Switching from FPM_LIST_UIBB to FPM_LIST_UIBB_ATS vis...
entry.content:
Hi,

maybe it's related to, if the time depency for relations is activated or not. I think if not activated, the old non ATs Tray needs to be used.  Please see:

https://help.sap.com/docs/link-disclaimer?site=https://me.sap.com/notes/2249877

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/6d52de87aa0d4fb6a90924720a5b0549/091a9652a3ffbd27e10000000a44538d.html?locale=en-US

Thanks for the hint to copy the standard ATS UIBB.

In my case we upgraded to 2023 and no tray was visible. The non ATS Tray was removed and the ATS Tray is not visible.

Best Regards

Tim

entry.title: DME file transfer to bank

Where is the DME file stored in SFSF ECP. Can we have SAP CPI to pick up this file from the location?.

Else can be send the file to the SFSF SFTP server from ECP for CPI to move to bank server.

Spoiler
SAP Integration Suite 

 

Regards

 

Jacob

entry.title: Re: SAP SuccessFactors Incentive Management - Guide to XDL APIs
entry.content:
Hi @jvallejocollados 

Thanks for reading my blogpost.. if there is any issue in few APIs, you can take the screenshot of that endpoint and you can create a SAP Support ticket to check in your tenant.

entry.title: Business Partner customizing for Automotive Industry
entry.content:
Introduction - In this blog we will see how we can take advantage of new business partner concept in S/4 HANA to facilitate an important aspect as per automotive industry.

This blog will comprise of following topics :-

1) An overview of S/4 HANA Business Partner

2) Business requirement of automotive industry

3) How to address this need

1) Some basics of S/4 HANA Business Partner - 

A business partner can be a person, an organization, or a group. A business partner can be characterized by the following basic structure:

  • Business partner categories​
  • Grouping​
  • Business partner roles​

2) Business need for partner function in Automotive Industry -

An automotive company has three important partners

  • Dealer - The customer is the business partner to whom the vehicle is to be sold. (dealers).
  • Sub-Dealer – A person or entity that enters into an agreement with Dealer to sell Company Service from a website on Dealer's behalf and sells such Service using a separate dealer code.
  • End Customer – They are dealer's customer. The end customer is the customer of the dealer who wants to buy car. Business partner role VLC001 End Customer is used for creating end customers and managed under dealer partner ID.

Mostly this industry has some unique partner function requirement as below

  • Requirement 1  – Company wanted same role (like VLC001) will be assigned to End customer & Sub-dealer.
  • Requirement 2 – Their number ranges will be different.
  • Requirement 3 – They should be able to distinguish in report as well.

3) How to solve this easily with help of S/4 HANA Business Partner - 

As same role, separate number ranges and some identifier were needed as per business criteria so we customized two different business partner grouping which will succor all the fitment.

New definition - ZZSD - Business partner grouping for Sub dealer

                         ZZEC - Business partner grouping for End Customer 

Benefits -

This definition kept reporting parameter different for both the partners.

Their number ranges are distinct but role is same.

Conclusion - Thus with phenomenal innovation of S/4 HANA, the critical functionalities are also achievable very conveniently.

entry.title: Re: Generative AI Hub - OUT NOW!
entry.content:
Hi @sarikar_dharmanna 

The link provided in step 1 is for the test, demo & development (TDD) BTP license offering for SAP partners - it's based on a PAYG model (but includes also free tier of course 😀). If you sign up for that (initial cost is nothing due to the PAYG approach) you can activate AI Core and AI Launchpad. Please be mindful that to enable the Generative AI Hub you need to activate the Extended service plan for AI Core which comes at a cost. You can see the costs under this PAYG partner model at the discovery center if you are logged in (see pricing tab under each service).

If you dont need access to the Generative AI Hub you can instead activate the Free service plan (you can find the details of limitations also on the discovery center under each service -> pricing tab)

Best regards,

Peter

entry.title: Table DDNTF is not active in the dictionary error during DMO
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

 

We are planning a migration to Hana DB with the nZDM method and trying to identify uptime processing tables.

When we added the DDNTF/T tables to the list, we faced the error says they are not active on DD.

As I understood from KBAs, these tables have been inactive since the Unicode Conversion.

 

Has anyone faced that issue?

 

BR,
Cagri

entry.title: Borrar búsqueda formateada
entry.content:
Hola!!

Se generó por error una busqueda formateada en un campo en los albaranes que copia al albarán una información que esta en la ficha del cliente en comentarios.

Estando en el campo del albarán --> herramientas --> herramientas de customizing --> valores definidos por el usuario, he eliminado la vinculación a esta query pero lo sigue haciendo. Se sigue copiando la información. 

¿Sabe alguien por que? ¿tengo que eliminar algo más?

Gracias!!

entry.title: Re: Embed mode not working for optimized story
entry.content:
@anthonysc did you set the parameter as described in the SAP Help portal?
Display Parameters

entry.title: SAP Business Network for Logistics 2404 Release – What’s New?
entry.content:
We kicked off 2024 with adding many more useful features and functions to SAP Business Network for Logistics. This blog post continues my monthly series and gives you an overview of some of the highlights of the 2404 release. This time, there are two updates, that will require action on your end:

  • New platform for SAP Cloud Integration 
  • Update of maps by 3rd party provider

Moreover, this blog proudly presents our recent SAP Innovation Award Winner ‘Corona’ – the company, not the virus. Make sure to read to the end and learn about their success story!

 

Cross SAP Business Network Freight Collaboration and SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace

New integration platform for SAP Cloud Integration

SAP Business Network for Logistics is run on SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP) leveraging the various services provided by the platform. One critical service used by the network is SAP Cloud Integration, which acts as the single integration platform. It enables customers and partners to maintain necessary connectivity configurations using apps, such as the ‘System Connections’ app or the ‘Configure Partner Connections’ app.

SAP Cloud Integration used by SAP Business Network for Logistics is currently hosted in the Neo environment of SAP BTP. The Neo environment in SAP BTP has been deprecated and will be sunset on December 31, 2025 (see SAP Note 3351844).

SAP Cloud Integration is also offered in a multi-cloud foundation in SAP BTP, which is the new platform that will be used by the network. As a result, existing connections from your backend Transportation Management systems (SAP Transportation Management standalone or Transportation Management embedded in SAP S/4HANA) and your API/SFTP connections will become invalid after the sunset (December 31, 2025). You need to migrate your connections to the new integration platform.

Migration guides will be made available on the user interface and on SAP Help Portal as part of the upcoming monthly releases. As of June 22, 2024, any new connections will be created in SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry environment. Read more here.

Code List Documentation

Deprecated values in ‘Means of Transport’ code list

The former code list values have been deprecated. You will be able to continue using the old values in existing mappings for some more time and don’t need to migrate immediately.

Relevant for SAP Business Network Freight Collaboration only: As of May 18th, 2024, the old values will be hidden on the user interface. You must use the new values instead.

Deprecated value in ‘Event Reason Code Description’ code list

CARRIER_OUT_OF_NETWORK has been deprecated. Please switch to CARRIER_OUT_NETWORK  before May 18th, 2024.

SAP Business Network Freight Collaboration

Dock appointment scheduling: notification emails updated

The email notifications for shippers and carriers in dock appointment scheduling have been harmonized and restructured. The most important data is now listed under ‘Appointment Details’.

We also changed the subject of the email notifications so you might have to adapt your email rules.

SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace

Fiori launchpad was updated to a higher version of UI5

The UI5 version of Fiori Launchpad for SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace is upgraded to 1.120.10.

Update of maps by 3rd party provider

The HERE Map Tile API is used by SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace to retrieve map tile images and create a complete map in the fulfillment tracking applications. The service has been upgraded by the 3rd party provider to HERE Raster Tile API v3.

To ensure that the map in your applications can work as usual, you must migrate to HERE Raster Tile API v3 manually by June 2024.  For more, see HERE Map Service Migration Guide in the Application Help.

Enhancement to business data export

The functionality to export business data has been enhanced. Solution Owners can now export based on ‘last changed time’ or ‘creation time’.

Additionally, the user interface of the export business data pop-up was improved. You can view requests and exported files with their completed time and status in a table.

 

For more, see Guide for Model Administrators.

Enhancement to specification of attribute-based authorization

When specifying a value for an attribute in the role using “ReadServiceAttributeTemplate” on SAP BTP cockpit, your entry should start with the role name followed by an exclamation mark, in this format: “RoleName!Value”.

For details, see Specify Attributes in the Role Using “ReadServiceAttributeTemplate”.

All Fulfillment Tracking apps: carrier reference document table added

On the ‘Event Details’ pages of fulfillment tracking applications, solution owners can now view carrier-related documents in a table.

 

Use Case Example: SAP Innovation Award Winner 2024 – Corona Industrial S.A.S

 Corona Industrial S.A.S (Corona) is a Colombian multinational with more than 140 years of business history dedicated to the manufacturing and marketing of products for the home, construction, industry, agriculture and the energy sectors. With 29 manufacturing plants, six divisions, and ~1500 trucks transporting goods each day the company needed to streamline and optimize their logistics operations by connecting their own fleet, and 3rd party carriers, to a digital supply chain network in support of customer demand. Corona’s focus is on best-in-world class innovation as a market leader.

They aspired to have a central “Control Tower” providing visibility into the movement of goods, to track and monitor shipments, optimize routes, lower the carbon footprint, and ensure timely delivery as well as establishing a collaboration platform for tendering and subcontracting with carriers.

Corona deployed SAP Business Network for Logistics, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Transportation Management, private cloud edition, and SAP Integrated Business Planning enabling a seamless integration of logistics processes.

Before, logistics processes and operations were labor-intensive and inefficient:

  • Tracking and visibility processes involved manually checking the status of shipments, contacting carriers for updates, and manually updating tracking information was labor-intensive.
  • Carrier selection involved manually reviewing carrier options, contacting carriers individually, and negotiating rates and terms.
  • Routing and scheduling involved manually determining the most efficient routes and schedules for shipments.
  • Physical handling transportation-related documents such as bills of lading, shipping labels, customs forms, and invoices was paper-intensive and inefficient.
  • Freight audit and payment processes involved manually reviewing carrier invoices and verifying the accuracy of charges.

With the help of SAP, Corona established an entirely new setup:

  • Corona team can select the most suitable carrier for each shipment based on predefined criteria such as cost, transit time, and carrier performance.
  • Planning of freight movements by considering various factors such as costs, carrier capacities, delivery time windows, and route optimization.
  • Shipments are planned and carriers are selected enabling Corona to execute and track the shipments with visibility into the entire transportation process, including pickup, delivery, exceptions, and delays. 
  • Collaboration with carriers, truckers, stakeholders, and customers with visibility into shipment status, leading to improved coordination and efficiency across the supply chain.
  • Integrated financial systems to automate accurate payments based on the actual activities performed, reduced errors, and improved accuracy.

Why SAP:

Corona chose SAP because it has a transportation and logistics solution with global coverage, that will allow them to collaborate and integrate with many organizations. By using the SAP Business Network for Logistics and SAP S/4HANA Cloud Transportation Management it guarantees a more fluid native integration of logistics tools, including the SAP Extended Warehouse Management (EWM) that is already implemented in one of their operations in Mexico. They say that: “SAP gives us an excellent capability of scalability for other regions and other operations, innovating together.”

 

If you would like to know more, follow this link to Corona’s Innovation Award Pitch Deck 2024.

Please share and amplify our new features and assets!

---------------------

The above summarizes the key innovations for 2404. We hope you enjoy the new capabilities. Thanks for reading the blog post and stay tuned! 

A full overview of the 2404 release can be found in the following link.

To learn more about SAP Business Network for Logistics visit SAP - Business Network for Logistics.

For further questions and feedback related to the blog, please check the Q&A area and feel free to post your questions in the link with the tag SAP Business Network for Logistics.

entry.title: Re: Quick Tips on Monitoring Templates in TechMon in SAP Solution Manager 7.2(Real life Experiences)

entry.title: How to active automatic complete backup in MAXDB studio.
entry.content:
How to active automatic complete backup in MAXDB studio.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to active automatic complete backup in MAXDB studio.
entry.content:
MaxDB Studio does not have such functions to automatically backup data files.
Alternatively, you can use DBA Planning Calendar (CCMS transaction DB13) to schedule automatic data backup.
For details, please refer to following SAP KBA.
##2814040 - How to schedule automatic data backup with file for MaxDB database via Netweaver DBA Planning Calendar

entry.title: Daten aus der LMDB oder SLD abrufen
entry.content:
wir würden gerne die gesammelten SAP Daten aus der LMDB oder SLD abgreifen und in unsere CMDB importieren. Welche Möglichkeiten bestehen für uns die Daten aus der LMDB oder SLD zur Weiterverarbeitung zu exportieren? 

für SAP Focused Run 4.0 FP02  werden LMDB Public TEST API´s angeboten, gibt es eine solche Möglichkeit auch für den Solution Manager 7.2?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Daten aus der LMDB oder SLD abrufen
entry.content:
Dear ,

 

Thank you for contacting SAP Support.

 

Regarding the requirement "wir würden gerne die gesammelten SAP Daten aus der LMDB oder SLD abgreifen und in unsere CMDB importieren. Welche Möglichkeiten bestehen für uns die Daten aus der LMDB oder SLD zur Weiterverarbeitung zu exportieren? "

I performed some research, and there is no option to export and map LMDB data to a central CMDB.

For what purpose do you intend to use such mapping from LMDB to the central corporate CMDB?

You can refer to KBA 2507941 to learn about how to use CMDB in Solution Manager 7.2

##2507941 - How to manage CMDB objects in Solution Manager

If further help is required about CMDB, please contact SV-SMG-SUP

 

Regarding the requirement "für SAP Focused Run 4.0 FP02 werden LMDB Public TEST API´s angeboten, gibt es eine solche Möglichkeit auch für den Solution Manager 7.2?"

There is only a document to describe LMDB Public REST API for SAP Focused Run 4.0 FP02.

https://support.sap.com/en/alm/sap-focused-run/expert-portal/frun-lmdb-main/frun-lmdb-public-api.html

 

Best regards,

Leo

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Which is the new version or alternative of C_GRCAC ce...
entry.content:
Hi @revanth_kanteerava1,

happy to answer your question.

Indeed, there is no successor for C_GRCAC, but we are planning to deliver live sessions soon which can give you updates on the latest developments in the Access Control area and in the GRC area in general. So, I am kindly encouraging you to register in one of the sessions as soon as they are communicated.

Thank you,

Omar

entry.title: Re: ABAP2XLSX problem downloading file
entry.content:
Bug reproduced in the latest version. BIND_TABLE doesn't handle a numeric column in TOP_LEFT_COLUMN. The right way to call is shown here: https://github.com/abap2xlsx/demos/blob/07d9663e39b68c834a212090ba857e5f6891d788/src/zdemo_excel11.prog.abap#L294-L300.

Issue and PR welcome.

entry.title: Re: Credit check not carried out due to missing UKM000 for a new customer
entry.content: Did you receive any feedback on this Mayank ? This strange behavior happening at our client too

entry.title: ABAP2XLSX delete row
entry.content:
Hello, all.

I'm trying to use ABAP2XLSX.

I want to print the content of an internal table in an excel sheet.
But the method bind_table is printint also a header, and I dont want a header of the columns.
(I've tried to modify the code of the method, but is not working fine...)

With the method SET_TABLE i have a dump, because the internal tabla has no dictionary structure...

So, in the end i'm trying to use BIND_TABLE method and then remove the header row, but I cannot find any method in class ZCL_EXCEL_WORKSHEET to delete a row.

Any tip?
Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 4 - Mobile device capabilities
entry.content: Great... thanks both of you for your quick responses. I will check this out. 👍

entry.title: Re: Exchange rate from po to MIGO
entry.content:
Hello, @muttepawar-2009, I'm facing the same issue - see below - with my customer. did you manage to find a solution?

I´m afraid that i haven't explain the problem properly. although, the document currency is EUR but there is a price condition which is in USD and this is the exchange rate that they want to update in migo date instead of PO date.

entry.title: Re: Exchange rate from po to MIGO
entry.content: Hello, @muttepawar-2009, I'm facing the same issue - see below - with my customer. did you manage to find a solution? I´m afraid that i haven't explain the problem properly. although, the document currency is EUR but there is a price condition which is in USD and this is the exchange rate that they want to update in migo date instead of PO date.

entry.content:

Thanks-

Abhishek

entry.title: Re: How to configure SAP system in Eclipse ?
entry.content:
Hello Mayur,
the Eclipse Tools for UI5 and the team provider have been sunset several years ago and are no longer maintained.
Please switch to more modern tools.
You can find more information in my blog posts
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sapui5-tools-for-eclipse-now-is-the-time-to-look-for-alternatives/ba-p/13457404 
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/how-to-get-your-preferred-javascript-ide-ready-for-sapui5-development/ba-p/13459175 

Best regards
Matthias

entry.title: Sorting not working on object Page Item table SAP CAP BTP Fiori elements
entry.content:
Hello All Members 

I have created an application using Fiori elements on SAP CAP BTP  list report page template , In object page I have an item table which can be sorted I have put the annotations to sort a field by default which is working but if I try to sort other columns using sort the table crashes and the application goes irregular below is some of the code snippet 
If someone know where I am going please help in correcting that 
The code might  not be properly copy pasted but there is no error in code please let me know for any solution on this 

In Manifest.json  file 

    "to_MucItems/@com.sap.vocabularies.UI.v1.LineItem#GOBTableSection": {
                  "tableSettings": {
                    "condensedTableLayout": true,
                    "enhanceI18n": "i18n/muc.properties",
                    "enableExport": true,
                    "enableFullScreen": true,
                    "enablePaste": true,
                    "selectAll": true,
                    "type": "GridTable",
                    "selectionMode": "Multi",
                    "creationMode": {
                      "createAtEnd": true,
                      "inlineCreationRowsHiddenInEditMode": true
                    },
                    "personalization": {
                      "column": true,
                      "sort" : true
                    }
                }

Annotation.cds file 

annotate service.mucHeader with @(
    UI.Facets : [
        {
        {
            $Type : 'UI.ReferenceFacet',
            Label : 'Item Details',
            ID : 'GOBTableSection',
            Target : 'to_MucItems/@UI.PresentationVariant#GOBTableSection',
            ![@UI.Hidden] : hideGOB,
        },}]

annotate service.mucItem with @(UI.PresentationVariant #GOBTableSection: {
  // $Type         : 'UI.PresentationVariantType',
   Visualizations: ['@UI.LineItem#GOBTableSection' ],
    // Total : [amount],
    SortOrder     : [{
        $Type     : 'Common.SortOrderType',
        Property  : lineNumber,
        Descending: false,
    }, ],
});
 
Line item definition 
annotate CatalogService.mucItem with @(UI.LineItem #GOBTableSection: [
    {
        $Type                : 'UI.DataField',
        Value                : lineNumber,
        Label                : '{i18n>lineNumber}',
        ![@HTML5.CssDefaults]: {width: '5REM'},
    },
    {
        $Type                : 'UI.DataField',
        Value                : article,
        Label                : '{i18n>article}',
        ![@HTML5.CssDefaults]: {width: '10REM'},

    },
    {
        $Type                : 'UI.DataField',
        Value                : articleDesc,
        Label                : '{i18n>articleDesc}',
        ![@HTML5.CssDefaults]: {width: '15REM'},
    },
]);

entry.title: COPA Derivation for Partner functions cannot working
entry.content:
S/4 Hana 2023.I have created a derivation rule for Partner functions  Sales Representative(Z2). This field is populating in test mode in KEDR based on sales order number, But when I post delivery and Billing documents, This field is not populating in COPA document

 

I have followed below steps.

1. I have created a characteristic for Sales Representative(ZZ1_ZEIGYOTT_MSE).

2. Created 2 derivation steps for the characteristic as below.

Sales Representative r

SOURCE FIELDS

VBPA-VBELN = COPA-KAUFN

VBPA-POSNR = COPA-KDPOS (selected Initial value allowed and Entire field content check box)

VBPA-PARVW = GLOBAL-USERTEMP1 (Specified Constant = SD Part Function(i.e.Z2)

TARGET FIELDS

VBPA-KUNNR = COPA-ZZ1_ZEIGYOTT_MSE

The other derivation is same as above except VBPA-POSNR = COPA-KDPOS (constant 000000)

this is working in test mode of KEDR based on sales Order, but during posting these are not flowing.

entry.title: 🇩🇪 Hands-on with the btp CLI and APIs
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event is on the Core Service APIs for SAP BTP and also the command line interface tool for SAP BTP, otherwise known as the btp CLI.

This CodeJam introduces attendees to btp, the CLI for the SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP). It also introduces attendees to the APIs for SAP BTP, known as Core Services for SAP BTP, which, according to the SAP Business Accelerator Hub, allow you to "manage, build, and extend the core capabilities of SAP BTP."

After completing this CodeJam, you have gained an overview of some of the core components from which SAP BTP is composed. You will also be then familiar with how to use the btp CLI on the command line, and also in scripts, to view, administer and generally manage these components and resources on SAP BTP. You'll also have a good understanding of what is possible with the APIs, and perhaps more critically, how to prepare and use authentication for them.

This is an in-person event only (not virtual) and is planned for Fri 07 Jun 2024 in Leverkusen, Germany. The language of the event and the content will be English. 

The event is kindly being hosted by Covestro in Germany, thank you! The location of the event is idea.lab Atelier on the ground floor of Building E54 in their offices in Leverkusen. Please aim to arrive at 0900 local time to get set up and plugged in, for a start at 0930.

The instructor is Developer Advocate DJ Adams. 

There are essential prerequisites that must be completed by every attendee, before arriving at the event location. They are documented here: https://github.com/SAP-samples/cloud-btp-cli-api-codejam/blob/main/prerequisites.md 

If you wish to attend, please indicate that using the "I'm attending" facility on this page. Please note that spaces are limited - we can only accommodate 25 attendees. In that context, if you indicate that you're attending, and later realise you're unable to, please remove your name so that others get a chance instead. Thanks!

For more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees, head over to the SAP CodeJam group.

entry.title: Re: Table DDNTF is not active in the dictionary error during DMO
entry.content: Did you check the SAP notes about DDNTF?

entry.title: SAP build action - 403 error for POST API call with CSRF enabled
entry.content:
I'm trying to upload attachment in SAP using API with SAP build process automation and action.

API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV is the standard API used to upload attachment for WO. I tried to configure it in Actions but it result in 403 error for POST api call with CSRF enabled. So I tried to get token with GET call first and then used the same token in POST call as static value which works fine as well.

I'm not sure why POST api call throw 403 error with CSRF enabled...

entry.title: Re: SAP SuccessFactors Mentoring
entry.content:
Hi

Having trouble finding the answer to this elsewhere, but can a Mentor also be a Mentee?  This seems like an obvious requirement in a large organisation, but is it possible in SF Mentoring? 

Thanks,

Emily

entry.title: Re: I am using exit_saplkedrcopa_001 for enhancement to p...
entry.content: Some wrong code in include ZXKKEU11 ?

entry.title: Re: Asset transfer ABUMN - partial transfer of wrongly ad...
entry.content: Hello @beam_liang, did you see my reply ? Do you have enough information to check ?

entry.title: Problem with Select-Options
entry.content:
Hi

I have a select options which displays some values from where which user can select multiple values.

Now the problem here is when i press enter after selecting some values the value at first index gets replaced by the value at last index. Can you give me a reason why that is happening and what can i do to resolve it.

This is the F4 Help that is displayed:

and this is how how the values are in select options: (First index replaced by last)

Below is the code for implementing f4 help: 

Implemented in Event - at selection screen on value request

1. Used FM - 'F4_FIELD_ON_VALUE_REQUEST'  to capture selected values in LT_RETURN.

2. Appending values to select-options

LOOP AT lt_return INTO DATA(ls_return).
      s_tabnam-low = ls_return-fieldval.
      s_tabnam-sign = 'I'.
      s_tabnam-option = 'EQ'.
      APPEND s_tabnam.
      CLEAR: ls_return, s_tabnam.
    ENDLOOP.

Regards,

Farhan

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud for planning - Set Advanced Filters on Date and Version
entry.content:
Hi Friends,

currently I am working with Advanced Filters. I want to set the Filter based on Date and Version. Like you can see in the image:

The outcome does not meet my excpectation:

As you can see "2 Forecast III" is also shown in the years 2022, 2023 and 2024 (not in image). But my expectation was that for "2 Forecast III" only 2024 is shown.

What is the issue in this case?

Kind regards,

Ismail
